text: The server runs on port 8080 in the us-east-1 region
Can you explain how async/await works in JavaScript?
Install with npm install express@latest and set debug to true
The Docker image is node:18-alpine and the endpoint is /api/v1/users
The error message says connection refused on localhost:5432
Run the migration: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN email VARCHAR(255)
Remember to rotate your password every 90 days as per company policy.
Log entry: User login attempt failed for username 'admin'.
We need to mock the API response for the test suite.
